children.text: Access MCP specs, join the developer forum, and shape the protocols your code will run on. No gatekeeping. No politics.
Access vetted standards, reduce vendor lock-in, and align your stack with protocols built for long-term scale. Make decisions backed by an open ecosystem—not closed promises.
Move fast without rebuilding the wheel. Plug into open standards, collaborate with builders, and launch on foundations designed to scale with you. Build once—grow everywhere.
Access open specifications, collaborate across disciplines, and turn research into real-world standards that shape the future of AI.

Get your organization listed on the AAIF Landscape to stand in front of enterprise buyers and investors. Submit an application today.

heading.text: Get listed on the AAIF landscape

children.text: Visibility with enterprise buyers and investors. Credibility from being part of the standards conversation. Access to working groups.
Contribute to open decision-making, shape protocol direction, and ensure standards remain transparent, accountable, and built for everyone—not controlled by a few.

title.text: Top benefits of listing with AAIF

children.text: Access open tools and shared standards to monitor, trace, and optimize system performance—so you can build with clarity, not guesswork.

title.text: Let's walk you through the process

children.text: These aren't committees. They're rooms where the people building agentic Al write the standards everyone will run on.
Defining threat models, authentication, and trust frameworks for agentic systems. Current output: threat model spec.
Contribute to open decision-making, shape protocol direction, and ensure standards remain transparent, accountable, and built for everyone—not controlled by a few.

title.text: See what’s happening under the hood

children.text: Discover amazing stories about AAIF influence in the community and overall on the future

heading.text: What people in the community say

children.text: "AAIF is the only organization that brings together the brightest minds in agentic AI to build a better future for all. I\'m proud to be a member."
"Open standards have always been the oxygen of the internet. AAIF is doing the same for agentic AI — and doing it in the open."
"Being part of the working groups here is the most signal-dense conversation I have all week. No fluff, just builders shipping."
"You can feel the governance and the engineering in the same room — that\'s rare and that\'s what makes AAIF work."
AAIF is a community-driven platform for advancing agentic AI research, collaboration, and open-source development.
You can create projects directly from your dashboard after signing up. Each project gets its own workspace for collaboration.
AAIF is open to entrepreneurs seeking cutting-edge AI solutions, researchers exploring the frontiers of agentic AI, and developers eager to build the next generation of AI agents.
Members get access to exclusive research, community events, project collaboration tools, and networking opportunities with leading AI practitioners.
Yes, AAIF offers a free tier with access to core features. Premium tiers are available for advanced collaboration and enterprise needs.
Access MCP specs, join the developer forum, and shape the protocols your code will run on. No gatekeeping. No politics.
Move fast without rebuilding the wheel. Plug into open standards, collaborate with builders, and launch on foundations designed to scale with you. Build once—grow everywhere.sdfsdf
